description:
Add three new fields to WorkflowConfig struct in workflow_config.rs:
- `phase_definitions: BTreeMap<String, PhaseExecutionDefinition>` — embedded phase execution defs from YAML
- `agent_profiles: BTreeMap<String, AgentProfile>` — embedded agent profiles from YAML  
- `tools_allowlist: Vec<String>` — command program allowlist from YAML

All fields use `#[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "...")]` for backwards compat.
Update builtin_workflow_config() to init these as empty defaults.
Import PhaseExecutionDefinition and AgentProfile from agent_runtime_config.
title: Add phase_definitions, agent_profiles, and tools_allowlist fields to WorkflowConfig
